title: doronicum stenoglossum
intro: Doronicum stenoglossum, also known as Golden Ragwort, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and bitter taste. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a popular remedy for treating wounds, skin conditions, and menstrual issues. The health benefits of Doronicum stenoglossum include reducing inflammation, relieving menstrual cramps, and aiding in digestion, making it a valuable herb for women's health. Doronicum stenoglossum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional folk remedies.
